title: Explaining differences in acceptability before and acceptance after the implementation of a congestion charge in Stockholm
authors: Geertje Schuitema, Linda Steg, Sonja Forward

excluded_policy_mentions.reason_it_is_not_a_carbon_or_fuel_tax: Road pricing on city-center entry/exit; not a tax on carbon content or fuel consumption.

inclusion_reason: Examines acceptability and acceptance of Stockholm’s congestion charge, but this is road pricing rather than a carbon or fuel tax.
exclusion_reason: Policy studied is a congestion charge/toll, not an explicit carbon tax, fuel tax, gasoline/diesel tax, or equivalent fuel excise.
